notes: Implemented Stage 5 multi-floor run flow on top of Stages 1-4: rebuilt GameManager with a full floor progression state machine (PrepPhase/WaveActive/WaveClear/FloorClear/DraftPick/FloorLost/Transitioning/RunEnd), 3-floor layout/wave support, floor clear + draft transition flow, floor-loss retreat flow with scrap penalty (60/40/20), and run-end victory/defeat overlay statistics. Updated editor scaffold generation to create Ground/Upper/Attic floor assets and wave sets, and wire new GameManager serialized fields. Added Stage 5 EditMode/PlayMode tests for floor transitions, penalties, attic loss/victory conditions, and run-end flow. Verification: 0 compilation errors, EditMode 19/19 passing, PlayMode 12/12 passing, GameScene play sanity check confirmed active wave spawning (TotalSpawned=5 by ~20s), floor graph instantiated, Safe Room integrity updates during attacks, and runtime console error count 0.
